included_data_or_behavior: Cell and pack voltage, current, temperature, isolation resistance, and contactor feedback
damage_context: Incorrect protection or control decisions; degraded detection of an unsafe battery condition

included_data_or_behavior: SOC, SOH, SOP, charge and discharge limits, thermal state, and charging state
damage_context: Unsafe charge or discharge decisions; loss of availability; misleading operator information

included_data_or_behavior: Contactor, precharge, charge enable, discharge enable, power limit, cooling, balancing, and fault-clear commands
damage_context: Unexpected high-voltage energization; inrush current; loss of power control; unsafe operating transition

included_data_or_behavior: Diagnostic sessions, security levels, routines, writes, resets, programming operations, and service identities
damage_context: Unauthorized programming; configuration changes; fault clearing; reset abuse; unauthorized service-mode entry

included_data_or_behavior: Executable image, firmware manifest, signer identity, security version, recovery image, and activation state
damage_context: Persistent malicious logic; disabled protection; unsafe behavior; failed startup; unrecoverable update

included_data_or_behavior: Thresholds, scaling values, battery capacity, cell count, chemistry profile, hardware compatibility, and control calibration
damage_context: Correctly signed software operates with unsafe or incompatible configuration values

included_data_or_behavior: CAN and CAN-FD identifiers, payloads, timing, counters, gateways, queues, and message-routing behavior
damage_context: Loss or delay of critical data; stale decisions; parser failure; resource starvation; communication outage

included_data_or_behavior: Logs, security events, findings, test results, code version, remediation history, and retest records
damage_context: Attack is missed; result cannot be reproduced; weakness is closed without evidence; investigation history is lost

included_data_or_behavior: Optional BESS EMS and PCS access, Modbus functions, certificates, network zones, user roles, and remote commands
damage_context: Unauthorized site control; manipulated setpoints; operational outage; unsafe remote action

included_data_or_behavior: JTAG/SWD, bootloader entry, serial console, and test pads
damage_context: Firmware or key extraction; persistent compromise that bypasses message-level controls
